blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,723 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
